title: Richly Glazed Turkish Lamb Iskender
description: A cultured and snappy Turkish dish featuring lamb, golden syrup, and a unique cooking method, perfect for a date night, served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together the golden syrup, paprika, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Place the sliced lamb in a large Korean brass bowl, leaving a small border around the edges.
Brush the glaze mixture evenly over the lamb, making sure to coat all the slices.
Cover the bowl with foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
Traditionally, Iskender is served with a side of pita bread or over rice, but feel free to get creative with your choice of sides.
